summary: Completed comprehensive role-based access control testing for Dashboard. Both backend APIs and frontend UI properly implement role-based restrictions. Super admin sees all groups via dropdown, group admin sees only their assigned group as fixed text.

design_issues.issue: Chart width/height warnings in console - charts display correctly but show console warnings

passed_tests: Group admin login with correct credentials
Admin can see all groups via dropdown
Group admin sees only assigned group as fixed text
Group admin vehicles filtered by group
Group admin brands filtered by group
Dashboard KPIs load for both roles
Frontend group filter shows dropdown for admin
Frontend group filter shows fixed text for group admin
Data isolation between roles working correctly
